query: I need a hospital near Patna for an emergency C-section

recommendation.name: Al-Shifa Surgical & Maternity Hospital
recommendation.reason: Surgical and maternity hospital with consistent data. Name indicates dedicated maternity services.

reasoning.text: Found 47 facilities in Bihar claiming obstetric or gynecology services.
Narrowed to hospitals and clinics with trust score above 0.5. 12 remain.
⚠ Shree Pradhan Hospital in Muzaffarpur claims obstetric services but lists 0 doctors and has zero equipment on record. Trust: 0.25. Do not refer here — the claims cannot be verified.
✓ Al-Shifa Surgical & Maternity Hospital in Bihar Sharif is a dedicated surgical and maternity facility. Trust: 0.9. Data is consistent with its claimed capabilities.
For a woman with a complicated pregnancy, being sent to the wrong facility means losing hours she may not have. Al-Shifa is the safest referral in this area.

warnings.name: Shree Pradhan Hospital
warnings.reason: Claims obstetric services but lists 0 doctors and zero equipment. Data does not support these claims.
